mdRecord.dcterms:title: Dr. C. M. Stigleman’s Address of Welcome – Delivered at the Reunion of Confederate Veterans August 21st
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Newspaper article in The Floyd Press, Thursday, September 6, 1894 entitled “Dr. C. M. Stigleman’s Address of Welcome – Delivered at the Reunion of Confederate Veterans August 21st,” 2 photocopied pages.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Virginia
Newspapers
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
